segments.text: For behold, the day is coming,
Burning like an oven, And all the proud, yes, all who do wickedly will be stubble. And the day which is coming shall burn them up, That will leave them neither root nor branch.
segments.speaker: The Lord of hosts

segments.text: But to you who fear My name The Sun of Righteousness shall arise With healing in His wings; And you shall go out And grow fat like stall-fed calves.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: You shall trample the wicked, For they shall be ashes under the soles of your feet On the day that I do this.
segments.speaker: The Lord of hosts

segments.text: Remember the Law of Moses, My servant, Which I commanded him in Horeb for all Israel, With the statutes and judgments.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Behold, I will send you Elijah the prophet Before the coming of the great and dreadful day of the Lord.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: And he will turn The hearts of the fathers to the children, And the hearts of the children to their fathers, Lest I come and strike the earth with a curse.
segments.speaker: The Lord
